summary: Iteration 8 testing completed successfully. All requested features verified: 1) Header no longer has language/currency switchers (removed from Header.js), 2) Settings page has language and currency selectors in Preferences tab, 3) Deposit modal shows client account_number (AC76743631) prominently in both Dashboard and Wallet pages, 4) History page shows 'Доход' for income/profit transactions with descriptions, 5) Portfolio cards display annual yield (12%, 18%, 28%) and per-period yield (1.00%, 1.50%, 2.33% per month), 6) Admin portfolio form has Profit Calculator in Доходность tab with investment amount input.
passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint working
Backend: Login returns account_number (AC76743631)
Backend: Get_me returns account_number
Backend: Portfolios return expected_return (annual yield)
Backend: Portfolios have duration_months for period yield calculation
Backend: User transactions endpoint returns transactions with type field
Backend: Company bank info endpoint works for deposit modal
Backend: Brokers endpoint returns brokers list
Frontend: Header does NOT have Globe icon or language/currency switchers
Frontend: Settings page has language selector in Preferences tab
Frontend: Settings page has currency selector in Preferences tab
Frontend: Dashboard deposit modal shows account_number AC76743631
Frontend: Wallet page deposit modal shows account_number AC76743631
Frontend: History page shows 'Доход' label for income/profit transactions
Frontend: History page shows transaction descriptions (e.g., 'Начисление прибыли по инвестиции inv_...')
Frontend: Portfolios page shows 'Годовая доходность' (Annual yield) - 12%, 18%, 28%
Frontend: Portfolios page shows 'За месяц' (Per month) yield - 1.00%, 1.50%, 2.33%
Frontend: Admin portfolio form has 'Калькулятор прибыли' (Profit Calculator) in Доходность tab
Frontend: Profit Calculator has 'Сумма инвестиции' (Investment amount) input
Frontend: Profit Calculator shows profit per period and profit by terms
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 8 features verified working: 1) Language/currency switchers removed from Header.js - now only available in Settings page Preferences tab. 2) account_number (e.g., AC76743631) is returned by login and get_me endpoints and displayed prominently in deposit modals on Dashboard and Wallet pages. 3) History page correctly shows 'Доход' for income/profit transaction types with descriptions. 4) Portfolio cards show both annual yield (Годовая доходность) and per-period yield (За месяц/день/час). 5) Admin portfolio form has ProfitCalculator component in Доходность tab with investment amount input and profit calculations.

details: Globe icon removed from Header.js
No language dropdown in header
No currency dropdown in header
Mobile menu also has no language/currency switchers
Language selector in Preferences tab with data-testid='language-select'
Currency selector in Preferences tab with data-testid='currency-select'
Both selectors functional and save preferences
Dashboard deposit modal shows account_number prominently
Wallet page deposit modal shows account_number with copy button
Account number format: AC76743631
Label: 'Ваш номер счёта для пополнения'
History page shows 'Доход' for profit/income transaction types
Transactions include descriptions like 'Начисление прибыли по инвестиции inv_...'
Green color and down-arrow icon for income transactions
Annual yield shown as 'Годовая доходность' (12%, 18%, 28%)
Per-period yield shown as 'За месяц' (1.00%, 1.50%, 2.33%)
Both values displayed in green gradient box on portfolio cards
Located in Admin Portfolio Form -> Доходность tab
Title: 'Калькулятор прибыли'
Investment amount input: 'Сумма инвестиции' with default $100,000
Shows 'Прибыль за месяц' (Profit per month)
Shows 'Ставка за период' (Rate per period)
Shows 'Прибыль по срокам' (Profit by terms) for each duration
